title: VelocityConfig
description: Root configuration for a Velocity-enabled repository

workspace.description: Workspace (multi-repo) connection — connects this repository to a velocity-workspace repo. Full workspace schema: schemas/workspace.schema.json

source.description: Git URL of velocity-workspace repo (SSH or HTTPS)

sync.description: How workspace intelligence is pulled: on_pull (manual /sync), on_push (auto on PR merge), ci_webhook (repository_dispatch from workspace CI)

last_synced_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last successful workspace sync

adapters.description: Which AI assistant adapters to generate

tier2_schedule.description: Cron expression for semantic re-scan (e.g. '0 9 * * 1' for weekly Monday 9am)

vector_index.description: Generate ingest-index.json sidecar during /ingest runs. Enable when the knowledge base has 50+ ADRs or 200+ indexed documents. The sidecar is a compact JSON lookup table for semantic search without a vector database.

git_digest_days.description: How many days of git history to include in the git digest. Default 90 days.

git_digest_max_commits.description: Maximum number of commits to include per git digest run.

customization.description: Controls how /sync handles manually edited adapter files

threshold.description: Fraction of a generated file that must differ from its template before /sync treats it as 'customized' and skips regeneration. Default 0.2 = 20% of lines changed. A file with fewer than threshold% of lines changed from the generated template will be overwritten on /sync; files above threshold are preserved with a warning.

always_preserve.description: Glob patterns for adapter files that are NEVER overwritten by /sync, regardless of threshold (e.g. '.cursor/agents/engineer.md' to lock a hand-tuned agent).

always_regenerate.description: Glob patterns for adapter files that are ALWAYS regenerated by /sync, overriding threshold (e.g. '.cursor/rules/velocity.mdc' to ensure the always-on entry is always current).
